description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named msvc that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build-windows-msvc-stl, build-windows-msvc-no-stl, and build-windows-msvc-stl-force-cpp03, each running on a windows-2022 environment. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, add msbuild to PATH, build using cmake and MSBuild, and run tests.
